# UC-10.17.13 · SonicWall Capture ATP Sandbox Verdict Summary (SonicWall)

## Description

Sandbox verdicts classify zero-day payloads that signature AV misses. Tracking malicious vs benign ratios measures advanced protection ROI.

## Value

Prioritizes endpoint sweeps when sandbox returns malicious for widely emailed files.

## Implementation

Parse verdict, file hash, and submission channel. Auto-open tickets on malicious.

## SPL

```spl
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-7d
| where match(_raw,"(?i)Capture ATP|sandbox|verdict")
| rex field=_raw "(?i)verdict[\s:]+(?<verdict>\w+)"
| stats count by verdict, file_hash
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Pie chart (verdict), table (hash, filename, src).
